name: ledger
description: Execution as Proof for money — the deterministic correctness layer AI agents call. Exact Money.from (no floats), kernel-enforced double-entry via JournalEntry + validateEntry + Ledger.apply, audit-hashed ledgers, canon citations. Provides /ledger-* skills and slash commands.

plugins.name: ledger
plugins.description: Deterministic financial-correctness guardrails: Money.from always, validated JournalEntry + Ledger.apply, audit-hashed ledgers, citations, no floats, provable balance + invariants.
